column2: AFDW_plot <- ggplot(mussel_info, aes(x = length, y = AFDW)) +
VFWC = ifelse(is.na(VFWC), VFWC[avg_time == max(avg_time[avg_time != max(avg_time)])] + 25, VFWC),
#Calculations for control data to get final water column and mixed measurements to correct for settling and death in mussel grazer experiments
select(treatment,Timepoint, Date, strain, category, avg_chla, avg_time, V, VFWC, VFM, hours) |>
mutate(C0 = avg_chla[Timepoint == "T0"], #Initial control measurement time T0.
CFWC = avg_chla[Timepoint == "T5"], #Final control measurement before mixing
dplyr::mutate(CFMx = (VFM/V)*CFM+(VFWC/V)*CFWC) |> #Control final corrected for sample volume removed
#Calculations for experimental data to get final water column and mixed measurements
select(treatment,Timepoint, Date, strain,open_time1, open_time2,total_AFDW, category, avg_chla, avg_time, V, VFWC, VFM, hours) |>
mutate(Z0 = avg_chla[Timepoint == "T0"], #Initial control measurement time T0.
ZFWC = avg_chla[Timepoint == "T5"], #Final control measurement before mixing
mutate(ZFMx = (VFM/V)*ZFM+(VFWC/V)*ZFWC, #Control final corrected for sample volume removed
ZavWC = (Z0-ZFWC)/log(Z0/ZFWC), #Average concentration chla in the water column
ZavM = (Z0-ZFM)/log(Z0/ZFM)) |> #Control final corrected for sample volume removed
#Combine the experimental and control data to caluclate feeding and clearance rates
FR = (V/(total_AFDW*(hours-closed_duration)))*(log(Z0)-log(ZFWC)+log(CFWC)-log(C0)), #Clearance rate on amount removed, includes correction
FI = (V/(total_AFDW*(hours-closed_duration)))*(log(Z0)-log(ZFMx)-log(C0)+log(CFMx)), #Clearance rate on amount ingested, includes correction
filter(!((category == 'blugrn' | category == 'total_chla') & strain == 'C'))#Chlamy treatment does not have any bluegreens
#Change all Inf, NA, NaN values to 0, as these represent treatments where either bluegreen or green were not present. E.g. C. oblonga controls
FR, #Clearance rates on amount removed mL/mg/h
FI, #Clearance rates on amount ingested mL/mg/h
FR, #Clearance rates on amount removed mL/mg/h
FI, #Clearance rates on amount ingested mL/mg/h
dplyr::summarise(across(rate, list(avg = mean, sd = sd, se= ~sd(.)/sqrt(n())), .names = "{.fn}_{.col}"))
